title: [IOS] Location sharing dialogue is visible on the Home Screen
scenario: Location permission dialog appears on Home Screen after first launch setup flow in Poly Lens app
steps: Launch Poly Lens app for the first time
Accept the license agreement and privacy policy
Observe the location permission dialog that appears
expected: The user lands on the Home Screen without any location permission dialog appearing, or the location permission dialog is presented before the Home Screen is shown, not after.
